```{=html}
                r: ${(r_est*100).toFixed(1)} cm | z: ${(z_est*100).toFixed(1)} cm<br>
                <b style="color:#38bdf8">p = ${Math.round(p)} Pa</b>
            `;
        } else {
            tooltip.style.display = 'none';
        }
    });

    spinBtn.onclick = () => {
        let val = 0; wSlider.value = 0;
        const iv = setInterval(() => { val += 0.5; wSlider.value = val; if (val >= 25) clearInterval(iv); }, 30);
    };
    resetBtn.onclick = () => { wSlider.value = 15; };

    draw();
})();
</script>
```

***

### Bonus: Usporedba Mirovanja, Ubrzanja i Rotacije

Ovaj interaktivni panel omogućuje istovremenu usporedbu triju osnovnih stanja relativnog mirovanja fluida.

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET: Usporedba tri stanja - FIZIKALNI REDIZAJN -->
<div id="v4-comparison-widget" style="max-width: 1000px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 24px; padding: 30px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; box-shadow: 0 20px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);">
    
    <div style="text-align: center; margin-bottom: 35px;">
        <h4 style="color: #0f172a; margin: 0; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 800;">🔄 Analiza Eulerove jednadžbe: Usporedni prikaz</h4>
        <p style="color: #64748b; font-size: 0.95rem; margin-top: 8px;">Različiti vektori efektivne gravitacije određuju oblik izobara</p>
    </div>
    
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 20px;">
        <!-- Panel 1: Mirovanje -->
        <div style="background: #f8fafc; border-radius: 20px; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; display: flex; flex-direction: column;">
            <h5 style="text-align: center; margin: 0 0 15px 0; color: #64748b; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase;">1. MIROVANJE</h5>
            <div style="background: white; border-radius: 12px; height: 220px; position: relative; border: 1px solid #edf2f7; overflow: hidden;">
                <canvas id="comp-c1" width="280" height="220" style="width: 100%;"></canvas>
            </div>
            <div style="margin-top: 15px; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #475569; line-height: 1.4; padding: 10px; background: white; border-radius: 10px;">
                <b>Vektor:</b> Samo <span style="color:#94a3b8">g</span> (vertikalno)<br>
                <b>Izobare:</b> Horizontalne ravni
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Panel 2: Ubrzanje -->
        <div style="background: #fff5f5; border-radius: 20px; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #fed7d7; display: flex; flex-direction: column;">
            <h5 style="text-align: center; margin: 0 0 10px 0; color: #ef4444; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase;">2. TRANSLACIJA (aₓ)</h5>
            <div style="background: white; border-radius: 12px; height: 220px; position: relative; border: 1px solid #fed7d7; overflow: hidden;">
                <canvas id="comp-c2" width="280" height="220" style="width: 100%;"></canvas>
            </div>
            <div style="margin-top: 15px;">
                <input type="range" id="comp-a-slider" min="0" max="10" step="0.5" value="4" style="width: 100%; height: 4px; cursor: pointer;">
                <div style="margin-top: 10px; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #475569; line-height: 1.4; padding: 10px; background: white; border-radius: 10px;">
                    <b>Vektor:</b> Rezultanta <span style="color:#94a3b8">g</span> i <span style="color:#ef4444">-a</span><br>
                    <b>Izobare:</b> Nagnute ravni
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Panel 3: Rotacija -->
        <div style="background: #eff6ff; border-radius: 20px; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; display: flex; flex-direction: column;">
            <h5 style="text-align: center; margin: 0 0 10px 0; color: #3b82f6; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase;">3. ROTACIJA (ω)</h5>
            <div style="background: white; border-radius: 12px; height: 220px; position: relative; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; overflow: hidden;">
                <canvas id="comp-c3" width="280" height="220" style="width: 100%;"></canvas>
            </div>
            <div style="margin-top: 15px;">
                <input type="range" id="comp-w-slider" min="0" max="30" step="1" value="15" style="width: 100%; height: 4px; cursor: pointer;">
                <div style="margin-top: 10px; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #475569; line-height: 1.4; padding: 10px; background: white; border-radius: 10px;">
                    <b>Vektor:</b> Funkcija <span style="color:#3b82f6">ω²r</span> (radijalno)<br>
                    <b>Izobare:</b> Rotacijski paraboloidi
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const rho = 1000, g = 9.81;
    
    function drawArrow(ctx, x1, y1, x2, y2, color, label) {
        if(Math.abs(x1-x2) < 2 && Math.abs(y1-y2) < 2) return;
        const headlen = 7;
        const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
        ctx.strokeStyle = color; ctx.fillStyle = color; ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x1, y1); ctx.lineTo(x2, y2); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.closePath(); ctx.fill();
        if(label) { ctx.font = "bold 9px Inter"; ctx.fillText(label, x2+3, y2+3); }
    }

    function drawStatic() {
        const c = document.getElementById('comp-c1'); const ctx = c.getContext('2d');
        ctx.clearRect(0,0,280,220);
        const ox = 140, oy = 110;
        
        // Liquid
        ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.15)";
        ctx.fillRect(70, oy, 140, oy);
        
        // Isobars
        ctx.strokeStyle = "rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.3)"; ctx.setLineDash([5,3]);
        for(let i=20; i<80; i+=20) { ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(70, oy+i); ctx.lineTo(210, oy+i); ctx.stroke(); }
        ctx.setLineDash([]);
        
        // Surface
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#3b82f6"; ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(70, oy); ctx.lineTo(210, oy); ctx.stroke();
        
        // Container
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#475569"; ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.strokeRect(70, 40, 140, oy+30);
        
        // Force
        drawArrow(ctx, ox, oy, ox, oy+40, "#94a3b8", "g");
    }

    function drawAccel() {
        const c = document.getElementById('comp-c2'); const ctx = c.getContext('2d');
        const ax = parseFloat(document.getElementById('comp-a-slider').value);
        ctx.clearRect(0,0,280,220);
        const ox = 140, oy = 110;
        const theta = Math.atan(ax / g);
        const dx = 70 * Math.tan(theta);

        ctx.save(); ctx.translate(ox, oy);
        
        // Liquid
        ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.1)";
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(-70, oy); ctx.lineTo(70, oy); ctx.lineTo(70, -dx); ctx.lineTo(-70, dx); ctx.fill();
        
        // Isobars
        ctx.strokeStyle = "rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.3)"; ctx.setLineDash([5,3]);
        for(let i=20; i<80; i+=20) { ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(-70, dx+i); ctx.lineTo(70, -dx+i); ctx.stroke(); }
        ctx.setLineDash([]);

        // Surface
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#ef4444"; ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(-70, dx); ctx.lineTo(70, -dx); ctx.stroke();
        
        // Forces
        drawArrow(ctx, 0, 0, 0, 40, "#94a3b8", "g");
        drawArrow(ctx, 0, 0, -ax*4, 0, "#f87171", "-a");
        drawArrow(ctx, 0, 0, -ax*4, 40, "#ef4444", "fᵣ");
        
        // Container
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#475569"; ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.strokeRect(-70, -70, 140, 140);
        ctx.restore();
    }

    function drawRotate() {
        const c = document.getElementById('comp-c3'); const ctx = c.getContext('2d');
        const w = parseFloat(document.getElementById('comp-w-slider').value);
        ctx.clearRect(0,0,280,220);
        const ox = 140, oy = 110;
        const R = 0.2; const scale = 350;
        const hc = 0 - (w*w * R*R)/(4*9.81);

        ctx.save(); ctx.translate(ox, oy);
        
        // Liquid
        ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.1)";
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(-70, 70);
        for(let x=-70; x<=70; x++) {
            let r = Math.abs(x/scale);
            let z = hc + (w*w * r*r)/(2*9.81);
            ctx.lineTo(x, -z*scale);
        }
        ctx.lineTo(70, 70); ctx.fill();
        
        // Surface
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#3b82f6"; ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.beginPath();
        for(let x=-70; x<=70; x++) {
            let r = Math.abs(x/scale);
            let z = hc + (w*w * r*r)/(2*9.81);
            if(x===-70) ctx.moveTo(x, -z*scale); else ctx.lineTo(x, -z*scale);
        }
        ctx.stroke();

        // Vectors (at r = R/2)
        const rx = 35; 
        const r_val = rx/scale;
        const z_surf = hc + (w*w * r_val*r_val)/(2*9.81);
        drawArrow(ctx, rx, -z_surf*scale, rx, -z_surf*scale+30, "#94a3b8", "g");
        drawArrow(ctx, rx, -z_surf*scale, rx + w*w*r_val*2, -z_surf*scale, "#60a5fa", "Fc");

        // Container
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#475569"; ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.strokeRect(-70, -70, 140, 140);
        ctx.restore();
    }

    function updateAll() { drawStatic(); drawAccel(); drawRotate(); }
    document.getElementById('comp-a-slider').oninput = drawAccel;
    document.getElementById('comp-w-slider').oninput = drawRotate;
    updateAll();
})();
</script>
```
